title: Lenskit Cross-Repo Links
description: Undirected co-occurrence links between repositories found in final federated query results. Note: v1 existed as a non-runtime placeholder and was not a stable runtime-consumed output before this correction to array-root runtime artifacts.

source_repo.description: Lexicographically first repository ID in the undirected co_occurrence pair.

target_repo.description: Lexicographically second repository ID in the undirected co_occurrence pair.

link_type.description: Minimal semantic link: both repositories appear in the same final result set.

confidence.description: The link is heuristic and inferred from co-occurrence only.

evidence_refs.description: Payload-local evidence references from returned final results.
